Membership tiers Membership faq apply now Follow our work

Why become a member?

Our platforms foster dialogue and collaboration across sectors and countries to drive meaningful outcomes. We serve as a bridge between regulators and businesses, facilitating impactful interactions and strategies. Our community represents a broad cross-section of diplomats, practitioners and industry leaders from in and outside of the region.

Gain Valuable perspectives
Dialogue with regional policymakers, regulators, industry leaders and experts, and gain vital insights on key regional and international issues pertaining to our 6 areas of focus.

Networking opportunities
Expand your network by joining the TE community and connect with professionals coming from a wide range of sectors and countries, including business, government, NGOs, and academia.

Exclusive resources‍
Access our articles and op-eds written by our network of experts and receive exclusive insights from our invitation only events.
‍
Platinum Membership
$5,000 per annum

For organisations seeking strategic access, and leadership engagement in shaping regional outcomes.
  • All Gold benefits, plus:
  • Priority access to invitation-only, closed-door policy dialogues.
  • Opportunities to co-host or co-brand flagship events and publications.
  • Exclusive strategic discussions with TE’s experts and leadership team on priority trade and regional issues.
  • Acknowledgement as a Platinum Partner across TE’s platforms and quarterly publications.
Gold Membership
$3,500 per annum

For organisations seeking insight, access, and meaningful connections in regional trade dialogue.
  • Priority access to all TE events: Receive invitations to closed-door meetings with global leaders, as well as priority access to our flagship events
  • Network: Join exclusive discussions and meal dialogues with our network of business leaders, policymakers, and experts
  • Briefings: Access regular briefings on emerging geopolitical & trade related issues in the region
  • Extend membership privileges to up to 7 nominated individuals within your organisation.
For more information, please contact us at contact@tradeexcellence.org.
